ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Current team of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the performance metrics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the performance metrics */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected by the player in the game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of field goals made */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of three-point shots made */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of free throws made */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team in the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team in the game */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City that the team represents */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team name */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_additional_info" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the additional info */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional specific info about the player */,
  "player_code" TEXT /* Player code for further identification */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_performance" (
  "season_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season performance metric record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the season performance metrics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season associated with the performance metrics */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists" REAL /* Total assists made by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds collected by the player in the season */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Season field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Season three-point percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Season free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
